query:
INSERT INTO cohorts (title, program, pathway, description, startDate, endDate, enrollDeadline, maxSeats, enrolledCount, earlyBirdPrice, standardPrice, cohortStatus) VALUES
('Faceless Content for Business: 2-Week Intensive', 'skills_intensive', 'virtual', 'Build authority without showing your face. Walk away with 30 days of content ready to post.', '2026-04-08', '2026-04-19', '2026-04-05', 20, 18, 25000.00, 35000.00, 'enrolling'),
('AI for Lead Generation', 'ai_course', 'virtual', 'Fill your pipeline without cold calling. Generate 10-20 qualified leads/week.', '2026-04-22', '2026-04-24', '2026-04-15', 30, 12, 35000.00, 45000.00, 'enrolling'),
('AI for Business Automation', 'ai_course', 'virtual', 'Save 10+ hours/week. Automate invoicing, client onboarding, social posting, follow-ups.', '2026-05-06', '2026-05-08', '2026-04-28', 30, 5, 35000.00, 45000.00, 'enrolling'),
('AI for Content Creation', 'ai_course', 'virtual', '30 days of content in 3 hours. Create a month of content in one session.', '2026-05-20', '2026-05-21', '2026-05-12', 30, 0, 25000.00, 30000.00, 'draft'),
('Executive Program: Strategic Innovation', 'executive', 'physical', 'Strategic refresh for leaders. Business Model Pivots, Scaling Leadership.', '2026-06-20', '2026-06-22', '2026-06-01', 15, 0, NULL, NULL, 'draft'),
('Startup Fundamentals', 'skills_intensive', 'physical', 'Startup Fundamentals, Digital Operations, Growth & Scaling, Venture Finance.', '2026-03-15', '2026-04-05', NULL, 30, 30, 25000.00, 35000.00, 'in_progress');
